title: ReFi, DeSci, and Community Activation
summary: GreenPill Germany source-backed activity around ReFi meetups, DeSci collaboration, Hypercert education, and chapter reactivation.
description: The public Regen Hub chapter update lists Hamburg and Munich ReFi activity, a first Hypercert launch, DeSci and ReFi at Berlin Science Week, community activation, steward onboarding, and future education campaigns. Treat metrics as qualitative until a newer steward update adds counts or deliverables.
